body: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada Tbk (TBKP) acquired 10% of Li Yuen Pte Ltd's shares in PT Obi Nickel Cobalt (NCKL) for IDR 2.11 trillion (USD 140.09 million), increasing NCKL's share ownership to 20%. The transaction changed the ownership structure of NCKL, with Lygend New Power Limited holding 60%, NCKL 20%, and Li Yuen 20%.
title: PT Trimegah Bangun Persada acquires 10% stake in PT Obi Nickel Cobalt for IDR 2.11 trillion.

body: PT Fajar Surya Wisesa Tbk (FASW) plans to raise fresh funds through a rights issue, aiming to reduce its debt ratio, which currently stands at 2.09, and improve its financial performance, which has resulted in a net loss of IDR 996 billion as of September 30, 2024. The company will issue up to 1 billion new shares with a nominal value of IDR 500 per share, with the exercise price yet to be announced, and will seek shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting on January 22, 2024.
title: PT Fajar Surya Wasesa to Raise Funds through Rights Issue to Reduce Debt and Improve Debt Ratio.

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) fell 0.94% or 70.52 index points to 7,394.24, ending a 3-day positive streak, with most sectoral indices declining, while net foreign sell reached IDR 2.18 trillion (approximately USD 137.05 million). PT Barito Renewables Energy TBK (TBRI) led the gainers with a 1.49% price increase, contributing 4.65 index points to the JCI, while PT Bank Central Asia TBK (BBCA) was the top laggard with a 2.40% price drop, suppressing the JCI by 16.16 index points.
title: Jakarta Composite Index Falls 0.94% as Most Sectoral Indices Decline

body: Hermanto Tanoko, owner of Tancorp Group, gifted his 17-year-old granddaughter Holly Natasha 500,000 shares of PT CLEO (CLEO) worth approximately IDR 662.5 million (USD 44,000) on her birthday, along with shares from seven other listed companies he controls. As a controlling shareholder, Hermanto's net worth is estimated at USD 2.1 billion (IDR 33.5 trillion), ranking him 1,545th in the global billionaire rankings.
title: Indonesian billionaire Hermanto Tanoko gifts his 17-year-old granddaughter shares from eight listed companies he controls.
